name: Awakening Guide Tee
description: A soft, premium cotton tee featuring the Awakening Guide motif. Designed for those who walk the path of inner knowing.

name: Trust the Journey Hoodie
description: A heavyweight hoodie with 'Trust the Journey' embroidered in gold thread. Cozy warmth for cool evenings and quiet reflection.

name: Collaborative Insights Mug
description: A ceramic mug with the Collaborative Insights logo. Perfect for morning tea, evening cacao, or any sacred sipping ritual.

name: Inner Light Travel Tumbler
description: Double-walled stainless steel tumbler with a gold lotus engraving. Keeps your beverages at the perfect temperature on every journey.

name: Crystal Energy Tote Bag
description: A sturdy canvas tote featuring hand-drawn crystal illustrations. Carry your essentials with intention and style.

name: You're Not Crazy Cap
description: An embroidered dad cap that says what your spirit guides have been telling you all along. Adjustable strap for all head sizes.

name: Sacred Geometry Enamel Pin Set
description: A set of three enamel pins featuring sacred geometry patterns: Flower of Life, Metatron's Cube, and Sri Yantra.

name: Spiritual Warrior Tank Top
description: A lightweight tank top with the Spiritual Warrior insignia. Breathable fabric for yoga, meditation, or everyday awakening.

name: Meditation & Reflection Journal
description: A beautifully designed printable journal with guided prompts for daily meditation, gratitude, and spiritual reflection. PDF download.

name: Chakra Alignment Workbook
description: A comprehensive digital workbook for understanding and balancing your seven primary chakras. Includes exercises, visualizations, and journaling prompts.

name: Energy Protection Audio Guide
description: A guided audio session for establishing energetic boundaries and spiritual protection. Includes three meditation tracks.

name: Intuition Development Course
description: A self-paced digital course with video lessons, exercises, and community access to help you develop and trust your intuitive abilities.
